title: Frying Pan Mace
description:
Replaces the mace with a frying pan.
[full model, sound, and name]
body:
This resource pack **FULLY** replaces the mace and makes it appear as a frying pan.

Now, it is **_very_** funny to use :)

This changes:
- Enchantment names for the mace (search pan in creative inventory to see names)

  ![Pan Recoil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bbd85d308821bc75408bf96aa76981941dd44be.png)
![Heavy Pan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c7c469f97a3a3a7ef2a216a9bffc94b5cf280b1.png)
![Pan Armor Destroyer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a3e9a18ed07dfa4763ee9fd9ae4b854bd7e051.png)
- Frying Pan model
![Frying Pan Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1670ed5987596cc5b5c7d1f1de1b6db0d4b444e2.png)
- Mace hit sound
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2ol1QJvysm8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Like all resource packs, this is client side, and only applies to anyone using the pack.

_Some mods were used in preview images and videos for this resource pack. These mods are not mine and are owned by their individual creators._
